name: PC Deals Weekly Update: June 22, 2003
description: June 18th, HP announced it's newest addition to its desktop line-up, the m200 series. This Media Center PC series has both retail and online customized versions, starting at under $999. Customizing a m200 series desktop will allow consumers to choose from the full range of Intel's Hyper-Threading (HT) processors, including the brand new 3.2 GHz processor.
